title: PanelAutoMeshByMaximumSize
description: PanelAutoMeshByMaximumSize: Divide the panel so that elements do not exceed a maximum size.

MaxSize1.description: This is the maximum size of objects created along the edge of the meshed area object that runs from point 1 to point 2. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

MaxSize2.description: This is the maximum size of objects created along the edge of the meshed area object that runs from point 1 to point 3. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
